description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Brilinta, a prescription medicine containing ticagrelor tablets. The box is predominantly white with purple and orange accents, featuring printed text in Russian and English, including dosage information and branding. The front face displays the Brilinta logo, dosage strength (90 mg), and the quantity of tablets (168). The sides of the box provide additional information such as instructions for use, storage conditions, and a barcode. The packaging is sealed and appears to be designed for pharmacy or clinical distribution. The surface is smooth and likely coated for durability, with clear, legible printing and pharmaceutical branding.
description: A white rectangular box of Brilinta medicine with purple and orange branding, labeled for ticagrelor tablets and detailed pharmaceutical information.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Brilinta logo, dosage, and a purple stripe along the edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main Brilinta branding, dosage (90 mg), and tablet count (168), with clear pharmaceutical labeling.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with minimal visible text, mostly showing the plain white surface and box structure.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring detailed instructions, storage information, and a barcode, with smaller text and less branding.
attribute_label_text: БРИЛИНТА тикгрелор таблетки 90 мг Таблетки, покрытые пленочной оболочкой 168 таблеток Для приёма внутрь AstraZeneca [illegible] Каждая таблетка содержит: действующее вещество: тикгрелор в количестве 90 мг. Содержит маннитол, карбоксиметилкрахмал натрия (тип А), гипромеллозу, магния стеарат и другие вспомогательные вещества, указанные в инструкции по применению. Хранить в месте, недоступном для детей. Хранить при температуре не выше 30°C. Отпускается по рецепту. 4 607085 319193
attribute_brand_logo: orange and purple stylized dot and arc design next to the Brilinta name
